# chalk_datasource_kinesis (Resource)

Manages a Chalk Kinesis datasource integration.

**Required permissions:** `secrets.write`, `secrets.decrypt`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) The environment ID that this datasource is scoped to.
- `name` (String) The name of the datasource integration.
- `region_name` (Attributes) The AWS region name, e.g. 'us-east-2' (`KINESIS_REGION_NAME`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region_name))

### Optional

- `aws_access_key_id` (Attributes) AWS access key ID credential (`KINESIS_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_access_key_id))
- `aws_secret_access_key` (Attributes) AWS secret access key credential (`KINESIS_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_secret_access_key))
- `aws_session_token` (Attributes) AWS session token credential (`KINESIS_AWS_SESSION_TOKEN`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_session_token))
- `config` (Attributes Map) Additional configuration for the datasource. Must not contain keys managed by the named attributes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `consumer_role_arn` (Attributes) Consumer role ARN to assume (`KINESIS_CONSUMER_ROLE_ARN`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--consumer_role_arn))
- `dead_letter_queue_stream_name` (Attributes) Kinesis stream name to send messages when message processing fails (`KINESIS_DEAD_LETTER_QUEUE_STREAM_NAME`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dead_letter_queue_stream_name))
- `endpoint_url` (Attributes) Endpoint URL to hit Kinesis server (`KINESIS_ENDPOINT_URL`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoint_url))
- `enhanced_fanout_consumer_name` (Attributes) Consumer name if using Enhanced Fan-Out consumption (`KINESIS_ENHANCED_FANOUT_CONSUMER_NAME`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--enhanced_fanout_consumer_name))
- `late_arrival_deadline` (Attributes) Messages older than this deadline will not be processed. Format: '1hr30m40s', '30m', 'infinity' (`KINESIS_LATE_ARRIVAL_DEADLINE`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--late_arrival_deadline))
- `stream_arn` (Attributes) The ARN of the Kinesis stream. Either this or stream_name must be specified (`KINESIS_STREAM_ARN`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stream_arn))
- `stream_name` (Attributes) The name of the Kinesis stream. Either this or stream_arn must be specified (`KINESIS_STREAM_NAME`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stream_name))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the datasource integration.

<a id="nestedatt--region_name"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region_name`

Optional:

- `literal` (String, Sensitive) A plain-text value.
- `secret_id` (String) The ID of an existing Chalk secret.
